metadata.task: Determine the x-coordinate where an identical additional weight should be placed to maintain beam equilibrium. Output one number.
metadata.description: Work from the Lever Equilibrium scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM computes torques based on weight positions and identifies the balance point.
reasoning: The existing identical weights are 5 m left and 2 m right of the fulcrum, so the net left torque is equivalent to one weight at 3 m. Place the extra identical weight at x = 3.
